releaseNotes:
- UI modernization and navigation improvements, and many more...

Team Netra

changelog.text: Improved performance with better downloads, video fetching, and Cloudflare handling.
Added DudeFilms, CinemaCity, and more content categories.
Enhanced UI for providers, detail pages, and navigation.
Upgraded Watch Party with room IDs and real-time chat improvements.
Fixed search, navigation issues, and improved TV remote support.
Optimized device info, headers, and analytics.

lockMessage: The app is temporarily locked for maintenance. Please check back later.
